final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-art
Asset type: traditional Chinese ink wash painting (水墨画), landscape composition
Primary request: a serene shanshui (mountain-water) ink painting with distant mountains, drifting mist, pine trees, a thatched cottage, and an elderly figure fishing by a stream
Scene/backdrop: layered mountain landscape — distant peaks fading into mist, mid-ground pine forest and thatched cottage, foreground rocky stream bank
Subject: elderly scholar-fisherman seated quietly by a winding stream, fishing rod in hand; ancient gnarled pine trees; humble thatched-roof cottage nestled among rocks; distant mountains dissolving into clouds
Style/medium: traditional Chinese ink wash (水墨), brush and ink on rice paper texture, xieyi (写意) expressive brushwork, Song-dynasty landscape painting aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide horizontal scroll (横幅) composition, three-depth layering (近景/中景/远景), generous negative space (留白) in sky and water areas
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight filtered through mountain mist, tranquil and contemplative, ethereal and timeless — Eastern aesthetic (东方美学)
Color palette: monochromatic ink gradients — deep ink black to pale wash grey, subtle warm rice-paper ivory ground, minimal muted moss green accent on pines
Materials/textures: rice paper grain visible, dry-brush (飞白) strokes on pine bark, wet ink bleed on misty mountain edges, ink pooling in rock crevices
Constraints: preserve ample negative white space (留白) to convey emptiness and spiritual resonance; no photorealistic rendering; maintain calligraphic brush quality throughout
Avoid: Western oil painting style, saturated colors, hard digital edges, overcrowded composition
